name: Hy-Tek Computers
notes:
Hy-Tek Computers (ASN 399688) is an ISP and IT solutions provider operating in Western Canada. 
We originate IPv4 prefix 64.141.50.0/24,108.174.70.0/24 and IPv6 prefix 2602:fb21::/40 from ARIN. 

We maintain diverse upstreams with Shaw, Telus, and public peering at YYCIX (Calgary) and YEGIX (Edmonton).

Peering requests welcome via PeeringDB or NOC email: noc@hytekcomputers.com. 
IRR policy object: AS399688 (AS-HYTEK). RPKI signed.

Our customer base spans all sectors — Oil and Gas, First Nations, Government, Education, Health, Enterprise, SMB
